speaker: Grubwin
text: He texted. He says he's 'in the preparation phase'.

speaker: Grubwin
text: He didn't specify. That's the part that worries me.

speaker: Mawla
text: Last time he was in a preparation phase he built the Scathagram slide deck. Before that he bought the worm bait.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Before that he tried to register 'Scatha' as an official club deity with the student council.

speaker: Grubwin
text: The student council secretary wrote back asking for a one-page summary of the deity's 'core values and mission statement'.

speaker: Grubwin
text: They said they'd 'take it under advisement'. That was four months ago.
